rows.name: Gasoline (all types)
rows.liveDriver: EIA weekly regular gasoline calendar-month average $4.050/gal vs prior $4.479/gal using 5 weekly prints
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Airline fares
rows.liveDriver: airfare fallback 5.29% plus guarded jet-fuel pass-through -2.74% from EIA Gulf Coast jet fuel calendar-month average $3.042/gal vs prior $3.943/gal using 21 daily prints
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Owners' equivalent rent of residences
rows.liveDriver: 75% lagged BLS shelter history (0.31%) + 25% lagged external rent overlay (0.10%): lagged external shelter overlay (2024-12 to 2025-12): Zillow ZORI 0.15% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; Apartment List -0.14% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; BLS/Cleveland Fed NTRI 0.33% avg m/m over 4 lagged obs
rows.scaffoldDriver: distributed lag over trailing BLS shelter history fallback

rows.name: Used cars and trucks
rows.liveDriver: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA +0.10 pp + Manheim m2 signal -0.39 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.04, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-06 unavailable in Manheim feed; m2 2026-04 -1.56% pub 2026-05-07; omitted unavailable m0. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Rent of primary residence
rows.liveDriver: 75% lagged BLS shelter history (0.28%) + 25% lagged external rent overlay (0.10%): lagged external shelter overlay (2024-12 to 2025-12): Zillow ZORI 0.15% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; Apartment List -0.14% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; BLS/Cleveland Fed NTRI 0.33% avg m/m over 4 lagged obs
rows.scaffoldDriver: distributed lag over trailing BLS shelter history fallback

rows.name: Milk
rows.liveDriver: DAIRY commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA advanced Base Class I milk price; lag 0, loading 1.38; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Uncooked ground beef
rows.liveDriver: BEEF commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA boxed beef Choice primal Chuck, USDA boxed beef Choice primal Round, USDA boxed beef Choice/Select spread; lag 0, loading 0.95; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Butter and margarine
rows.liveDriver: DAIRY commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA NDPSR Butter; lag 0, loading 1.50; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Eggs
rows.liveDriver: EGGS commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA combined regional caged white Large eggs midpoint, USDA combined regional caged white Extra Large eggs midpoint, USDA combined regional caged white Medium eggs midpoint; lag 0, loading 1.00; live cut adjustment 0.19 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average
